HGSS.047.0000:
[0103,0001,0000]: Hey, [0103,0000,0000]!
You’re here in Kanto, too?\f
Some of the Trainers here are tough,
which makes it easy to train\r
my Pokémon!\f
[0103,0000,0000]!
I know that you are strong...\f
But...
I can’t help but challenge you!\f
HGSS.047.0001:
[0103,0001,0000]: My training’s still not
good enough...?\f
My Pokémon are so weak, it makes me
frustrated...\f
But I can feel that they are getting
better after each battle...\f
..................
Tch!\f
They’re still too weak!
I need to give them more training...\f
I know!
I should take them to Dragon’s Den!\r
See ya, [0103,0000,0000]!\f
